query: top 3 smartphones in 2025, compare pricing across US marketplaces
answer_text: Here are three of the strongest smartphones in 2025, with US marketplace pricing drawn from major retailers. Apple iPhone 16 is the best all-around pick for most buyers, with a starting MSRP of $799 and used-market averages near $613. Samsung Galaxy S25 is the top Android flagship at $799.99 new, trending lower on resale at roughly $469. Google Pixel 9a is the clear value choice at $499, positioned as the best budget Android of the year. For new-phone pricing the cleanest comparison is retail MSRP across Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart, where both the iPhone 16 and Galaxy S25 launched at about $800. On secondary marketplaces the Galaxy S25 averages lower used than the iPhone 16, making it the cheapest flagship of the three on resale, while the Pixel 9a stays the lowest-cost option overall. Best overall: iPhone 16. Best Android flagship: Galaxy S25. Best value: Pixel 9a.
